legends.name: Pele
legends.bio: Edson Arantes do Nascimento, known as Pelé, was a Brazilian professional footballer who played as a forward. Regarded as one of the greatest players of all time.

legends.name: Diego Maradona
legends.bio: Diego Armando Maradona was an Argentine professional football player and manager. Widely regarded as one of the greatest players in the history of the sport.

legends.name: Johan Cruyff
legends.bio: Hendrik Johannes Cruijff was a Dutch professional football player and manager. He is considered one of the most influential figures in football history.
